message:
fix: replace panics with safe fallbacks and update issue tracker

Two categories of improvements across the codebase:

Theme color parsing (src/format/theme.rs, src/output/theme.rs):
  Replace the color() helper's unwrap-or-panic with a graceful fallback
  to Color::default_color(). A debug_assert still fires in development
  builds so invalid color names are caught during testing, but production
  builds no longer abort on an unexpected color string.

Test assertions (config.rs, create.rs, main.rs, id.rs, validation/mod.rs):
  Replace panic!() in unreachable test match arms with unreachable!(),
  which better communicates intent and produces clearer diagnostics when
  a match arm that should never be reached is somehow entered.

Issue tracker (.beads/issues.jsonl):
  Mark beads_rust-1yb3 (UBS triage) as in_progress to reflect current
  work state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
